title: objdiff candidate scoring
description: Score a candidate object for one function against the target object using the harness objdiff-cli fork.
status_message: Harness bridge v1: APIs use objdiff_path.py, ninja_compile.py, and objdiff-cli score/diff.
limitations: Requires a candidate object built from the current source and target objects under build/GALE01/obj.
Score breakdown depends on the harness objdiff-cli score server; percent diff is used as supplemental output.
A good score is evidence for one object/function only and must be interpreted with source diff and neighbor regression checks.

usage.agent_guidance: Use when a candidate object already exists and a focused score helps decide whether to keep or discard a source-shape hypothesis.
